label: Collecting data
description: Routinely gathering or capturing raw data, typically about a defined population (employees, licensees, complaints). In: field or regular data capture. Out: analysing or reporting on data already held.
exemplars: We collect a number of data related to employment regularly; We collect certain data’s related to our licensees to determine certain things; Collect data for report to Management

label: Analysing data and producing reports
description: Processing, analysing, interpreting or evaluating data and turning it into reports or written outputs. In: analysis, interpretation, report writing, actionable reports. Out: merely collecting data, or using someone else's finished report to decide.
exemplars: My role involves data cleaning, data interpretation, forecasted projections based on data, data analysis and reporting; Data analysis and reporting; We process all data from all MDAs and create actionable reports

label: Forecasting and projections
description: Using data to forecast, project or monitor future conditions such as demand, stock or trends. In: predictive or forward-looking analysis. Out: descriptive reporting of past data only.
exemplars: Monitor and forecast stock and demand of cash to make sure cash is always available for the country; forecasted projections based on data

label: Research
description: Conducting research or surveys as the primary framing of the data work. In: explicit research or survey activity. Out: routine operational reporting not described as research.
exemplars: Doing research I work a lot with data; Research work, data evaluation and report writing; data analysis of complaints, financial inclusion and survey

label: Using data to make or inform decisions
description: Data is consumed to support management decisions or provide advice, whether by the participant or by others they enable. In: decision support, advising, informing management. Out: producing the analysis itself without reference to a decision.
exemplars: Very crucial because we use data to make decisions.; to provide reports to the management for effective decision making; I enable staff to make informed decisions

label: Maintaining systems and infrastructure
description: Managing the technical systems, servers, databases, backups and security that keep data available, accurate and protected. In: IT/system support, data security, storage. Out: analytical or substantive use of the data content.
exemplars: I am responsible for ensuring that the organization’s information systems, servers, databases, and network infrastructure operate securely; managing data backups and recovery, maintaining system security

label: Advisory and administrative roles
description: Roles that touch data only loosely through advising, facilitating or administrative/planning functions rather than directly handling datasets. In: facilitation, advising investors, events/accountability work. Out: hands-on collection, analysis or systems work.
exemplars: Events planning, accountability in government etc; Facilitate and advise investors on how to navigate the business environment in Seychelles
